metadata.significance: Describes cosmic changes on the Day of Judgment

ayahs.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ إِذَا ٱلشَّمْسُ كُوِّرَتْ

translations.en_sahih: When the sun is wrapped up [in darkness]
translations.en_yusufali: When the sun (with its spacious light) is folded up;
translations.ms_basmeih: Apabila matahari dilingkari cahayanya (dan hilang lenyap);

translations.en_sahih: And when the stars fall, dispersing,
translations.en_yusufali: When the stars fall, losing their lustre;
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan apabila bintang-bintang gugur berselerak;

translations.en_sahih: And when the mountains are removed
translations.en_yusufali: When the mountains vanish (like a mirage);
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan apabila gunung-ganang di terbangkan ke angkasa (setelah dihancurkan menjadi debu);

translations.en_sahih: And when full-term she-camels are neglected
translations.en_yusufali: When the she-camels, ten months with young, are left untended;
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan apabila unta-unta yang bunting terbiar;

translations.en_sahih: And when the wild beasts are gathered
translations.en_yusufali: When the wild beasts are herded together (in the human habitations);
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan apabila binatang-binatang liar dihimpunkan;

translations.en_sahih: And when the seas are filled with flame
translations.en_yusufali: When the oceans boil over with a swell;
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan apabila lautan meluap-luap bercampur-baur;

translations.en_sahih: And when the souls are paired
translations.en_yusufali: When the souls are sorted out, (being joined, like with like);
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan apabila tiap-tiap diri disatukan dengan pasangannya;

translations.en_sahih: And when the girl [who was] buried alive is asked
translations.en_yusufali: When the female (infant), buried alive, is questioned -
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan apabila anak perempuan yang ditanam hidup-hidup: ditanya, -

translations.en_sahih: For what sin she was killed
translations.en_yusufali: For what crime she was killed;
translations.ms_basmeih: Dengan dosa apakah ia dibunuh?

translations.en_sahih: And when the pages are made public
translations.en_yusufali: When the scrolls are laid open;
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan apabila surat-surat amal dibentangkan;

translations.en_sahih: And when the sky is stripped away
translations.en_yusufali: When the world on High is unveiled;
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan apabila langit ditanggalkan dari tempatnya;

translations.en_sahih: And when Hellfire is set ablaze
translations.en_yusufali: When the Blazing Fire is kindled to fierce heat;
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan apabila neraka dinyalakan menjulang;

translations.en_sahih: And when Paradise is brought near,
translations.en_yusufali: And when the Garden is brought near;-
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan apabila Syurga didekatkan;

translations.en_sahih: A soul will [then] know what it has brought [with it].
translations.en_yusufali: (Then) shall each soul know what it has put forward.
translations.ms_basmeih: (Setelah semuanya itu berlaku), tiap-tiap orang akan mengetahui tentang amal yang telah dibawanya.

translations.en_sahih: So I swear by the retreating stars -
translations.en_yusufali: So verily I call to witness the planets - that recede,
translations.ms_basmeih: Oleh itu, Aku bersumpah dengan bintang-bintang yang tenggelam timbul;

translations.en_sahih: Those that run [their courses] and disappear -
translations.en_yusufali: Go straight, or hide;
translations.ms_basmeih: Yang beredar, juga yang tetap pada tempatnya;

translations.en_sahih: And by the night as it closes in
translations.en_yusufali: And the Night as it dissipates;
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan malam, apabila ia hampir habis,

translations.en_sahih: And by the dawn when it breathes
translations.en_yusufali: And the Dawn as it breathes away the darkness;-
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan siang, apabila ia mulai terang;

translations.en_sahih: [That] indeed, the Qur'an is a word [conveyed by] a noble messenger
translations.en_yusufali: Verily this is the word of a most honourable Messenger,
translations.ms_basmeih: Sebenarnya Al-Quran itu, sungguh-sungguh Kalamullah (yang disampaikan oleh Jibril) Utusan yang mulia,

ayahs.arabic: ذِى قُوَّةٍ عِندَ ذِى ٱلْعَرْشِ مَكِينٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Thee quwwatin AAinda thee alAAarshi makeenin

translations.en_sahih: [Who is] possessed of power and with the Owner of the Throne, secure [in position],
translations.en_yusufali: Endued with Power, with rank before the Lord of the Throne,
translations.ms_basmeih: Yang kuat gagah, lagi berkedudukan tinggi di sisi Allah yang mempunyai Arasy,

translations.en_sahih: Obeyed there [in the heavens] and trustworthy.
translations.en_yusufali: With authority there, (and) faithful to his trust.
translations.ms_basmeih: Yang ditaati di sana (dalam kalangan malaikat), lagi dipercayai.

translations.en_sahih: And your companion is not [at all] mad.
translations.en_yusufali: And (O people!) your companion is not one possessed;
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sebenarnya sahabat kamu (Nabi Muhammad) itu (wahai golongan yang menentang Islam), bukanlah ia seorang gila (seperti yang kamu tuduh);

translations.en_sahih: And he has already seen Gabriel in the clear horizon.
translations.en_yusufali: And without doubt he saw him in the clear horizon.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan (Nabi Muhammad yakin bahawa yang disampaikan kepadanya ialah wahyu dari Tuhan, kerana) demi sesungguhnya! Nabi Muhammad telah mengenal dan melihat Jibril di kaki langit yang nyata.

translations.en_sahih: And Muhammad is not a withholder of [knowledge of] the unseen.
translations.en_yusufali: Neither doth he withhold grudgingly a knowledge of the Unseen.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan bukanlah Nabi Muhammad seorang yang boleh dituduh dan disangka buruk, terhadap penyampaiannya mengenai perkara-perkara yang ghaib.

translations.en_sahih: And the Qur'an is not the word of a devil, expelled [from the heavens].
translations.en_yusufali: Nor is it the word of an evil spirit accursed.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sebenarnya Al-Quran itu bukanlah perkataan Syaitan yang kena rejam.

translations.en_sahih: So where are you going?
translations.en_yusufali: When whither go ye?
translations.ms_basmeih: (Dengan yang demikian) maka ke manakah kamu hendak pergi (kiranya kamu masih menyeleweng dari jalan Al-Quran)?

translations.en_sahih: It is not except a reminder to the worlds
translations.en_yusufali: Verily this is no less than a Message to (all) the Worlds:
translations.ms_basmeih: Al-Quran itu tidak lain hanyalah peringatan bagi seluruh penduduk alam:

translations.en_sahih: For whoever wills among you to take a right course.
translations.en_yusufali: (With profit) to whoever among you wills to go straight:
translations.ms_basmeih: Iaitu bagi sesiapa dari kamu yang mahu tetap teguh di atas jalan (Islam) yang betul.

ayahs.arabic: وَمَا تَشَآءُونَ إِلَّآ أَن يَشَآءَ ٱللَّهُ رَبُّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wama tashaoona illa an yashaa Allahu rabbu alAAalameena

translations.en_sahih: And you do not will except that Allah wills - Lord of the worlds.
translations.en_yusufali: But ye shall not will except as Allah wills,- the Cherisher of the Worlds.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan kamu tidak dapat menentukan kemahuan kamu (mengenai sesuatupun), kecuali dengan cara yang diatur oleh Allah, Tuhan yang memelihara dan mentadbirkan seluruh alam.
